project.component: { "keyToString": { "CMake デバッグ.main.executor": "Debug", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "OpenOCD をダウンロードして実行.OCD main.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.RadMigrateCodeStyle": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.west.config.association.type.startup.service": "true", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "last_opened_file_path": "/home/ss/26catch/f7/motor_tuning/motor_tuning.ioc", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "CLionExternalConfigurable", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
